Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Did Srila Prabhupada predict the 3rd world war?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-11-06 · 9 answers
(nuclear)
user [206] · 2007-11-06
Um...I dont think so. The wording on that website is extremely misleading.

They make it seem like Srila Prabhupada is some kind of mystic who can tell the future. In reality, hes a pure devotee, an instrument of Krishna, hes basically saying "karma works, you do bad things, bad things will happen to you."

Ive seen sites like this, I found a video on youtube that claims Srila Prabhupada predicted 9/11. But I think its all bogus. But thats just me.
user [179] · 2007-11-06
true, karma works and is wonder full to get to see that it is beyond the modes acting, and that everything goes as sweeftly because of the modes too, they act like tight strings or templade ropes, it will collapse one day i think, so better to know how.

i also can do tell that this predictions happened to occurre too to thisj eweller merchant in India,.. and he couldnt understand the meanings of his visions at that time, even his 12 gurus couldnt'b4t help it. and so on,... being this the brahma madhva sampradaya i thought it relevant to paste these question here. check this out <.
user [188] · 2007-11-06
Harikesa seemed to think that the third World War would start on June 22, 1982. Ive read bits and pieces about this in places, including in Suhorta prabhus website.
user [40] · 2007-11-07
Oh man I missed it who won?
user [19] · 2007-11-07

user [40] · 2007-11-07

user [213] · 2007-11-10
Due to the increase of sinful activities in Kali Yuga,such clean-up is bound to happen..very soon! Actually,the Sankirtana Movement has delayed it,but as news are telling us daily,its getting crazier each day in the material world,but devotees should not be affected by such danger as we know the Bhagavad-Gita,and that its all Sri Krsnas plan:people will be more receptive when they are in distress,and the 3rd World War will cleanse the world from stubborn people who are ridiculising our way of life.When they see that there is no better way than to live a simple life,they will adopt it,with the help of devotee politicians,in positions of power,who will then impose the Divine way of life.
user [179] · 2007-11-10
jaya, we were discussing just of about the govardhan puja today,.. well that the end of the material world comes and it cease to exist when there will be no one to put the seed of the year to the hill representing govardhan made of mustard seeds just about in vrndavan village, well i think that actually aravindha prabhu if am wrong corrects me, because i never heard of this one way of prising govardhan hill as krsna himself. and i agree.. its going to be cleaned up very sooooon !
user [40] · 2007-11-11
Dear Suryavanshi

I love your posts, you are getting my vote next time we pick the best posters.

On another point and this is a general comment addressed to all:

the Kali Yuga is thousands of years long, it has hardly even begun. The cleanup is predicted to be at the end as far as I understand it.

Where is the support for the clean-up idea in Srila Prabhupadas books, or elsewhere

all points of view invited
